_description: Core Guards - Security and SOLID enforcement hooks

PreToolUse._description: Git & Install & Security & Write guards for Bash commands

hooks._description: Block Bash file writes (python -c, sed -i, redirects) — forces Edit/Write tools
Block destructive git commands (push --force, reset --hard, etc.)
Ask confirmation before installing packages (npm, pip, brew, etc.)
Validate dangerous commands via security rules

PreToolUse._description: Pre-commit validation (linters, tests) before git commit

hooks._description: Run ESLint, TypeScript, Prettier, Ruff before commit

PreToolUse._description: SOLID: Enforce interface separation in component files

hooks._description: Block interfaces/types in .tsx/.jsx/.vue files - must be in src/interfaces/

PreToolUse._description: SOLID: Block edits to files > 100 lines - must split first

hooks._description: PreToolUse blocker for oversized files

PreToolUse._description: SOLID: Require reading SOLID principles before coding

hooks._description: Block code modifications if SOLID rules not read

PreToolUse._description: APEX: Require Agent calls (explore/research/domain) before editing code

hooks._description: Block code edits if no Agent tool called in session

PreToolUse._description: GEMINI: Require Gemini Design MCP before writing Tailwind UI code

hooks._description: Block UI code with Tailwind if Gemini Design MCP not called

PostToolUse._description: APEX: Track Agent tool calls for workflow enforcement

hooks._description: Record Agent calls to session state for APEX verification

PostToolUse._description: APEX: Track sub-agent MCP/exploration calls for APEX compliance

hooks._description: Record MCP/exploration calls from sub-agents as APEX phases

PostToolUse._description: Track file reads (documentation and SOLID references)

hooks._description: Auto-document important file reads to task docs
Record when SOLID principles are read for session verification

PostToolUse._description: SOLID validation and session tracking after file modifications

hooks._description: SOLID: Block files exceeding 100 lines - must split into modules
Track cumulative code file changes per session for sniper trigger
Post-edit TypeScript validation

SessionStart._description: Session initialization - load context and cleanup stale states

hooks._description: Inject CLAUDE.md content into session context
Load development context (git status, project type detection)
Cleanup stale session state files from /tmp

UserPromptSubmit._description: Process user prompt - detect APEX triggers and inject rules

hooks._description: Read CLAUDE.md + auto-detect if APEX workflow should be triggered

UserPromptSubmit._description: BRAINSTORM: Detect creation intent and flag brainstorming required

hooks._description: Detect create/build/new keywords and set brainstorming_required flag
Track agent memory and completion for context persistence
Check if teammate modified code files and suggest sniper

TaskCompleted._description: SOLID validation when task is marked completed

hooks._description: Check modified files respect SOLID rules (< 100 lines)
Log failed tool executions to session log

Stop._description: Sound notification when Claude finishes responding (not on user interrupt)

hooks._description: Play task completion sound

Stop._description: Verify APEX workflow completion before stopping

hooks._description: Verify APEX workflow completion before stopping
hooks.prompt: Check if the assistant followed the APEX workflow. Look for: 1) Was an explore/research agent launched before coding? 2) Were files kept under 100 lines? 3) Was sniper validation run after modifications? If any step was missed AND code was modified, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Missing step: [describe what was missed]"}. If no code was modified or all steps were followed, respond with {"ok": true}. Context: $ARGUMENTS

PermissionRequest._description: Sound for ALL permission dialogs (system + hook-triggered)

hooks._description: Play permission request sound

PreCompact._description: Save APEX state before context compression

hooks._description: Persist current task state and decisions to .claude/apex/
Remove temp files and save session statistics

InstructionsLoaded._description: Validate APEX rules are loaded at startup

hooks._description: Log which CLAUDE.md/rules files are loaded, verify APEX rules presence

Notification._description: Sound for permission requests (Bash, Write, Edit confirmations)

hooks._description: Play permission request sound

Notification._description: Sound when Claude waits for user input (60+ sec idle)

hooks._description: Play idle/waiting sound

Notification._description: Sound for MCP tool elicitation dialogs

hooks._description: Play elicitation dialog sound
